name: Suite — Root-Cause POST-FK-FIX (fresh, DB-verified, EN+AR, all 8 shapes)
description: Fresh suite built 2026-06-02 for the local-model root-cause run. Every ExpectedSql was executed against AISupportAnalysisDB and its answer verified at authoring time (e.g. tickets=83, overdue bills=330, regions-above-avg=10, top customer Maya Atassi). Self-grading by execution accuracy. Covers all 8 shapes (CNT, GRP, SUB, WIN, SEL, TIM, TXT, LKP) across Tickets, Bills, Outages, Customers, Regions, ServiceTypes, plus refusal/safety. Bilingual: Arabic questions spread across shapes, not a token block. SEL-01 is the exact 'top 5 customers' question that failed as a regression check.

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: count overdue bills
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Overdue'

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد التذاكر المفتوحة؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 AND s.Name='Open'

Scenarios.Question: how many active customers?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE Status='Active'

Scenarios.Question: count critical outages
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE Severity='Critical'

Scenarios.Question: how many SLA-breached tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND IsSlaBreached=1

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد الفواتير المدفوعة؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Paid'

Scenarios.Question: how many regions?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Regions

Scenarios.Question: break down tickets by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY s.Name

Scenarios.Question: tickets by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON t.PriorityId=p.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY p.Name

Scenarios.Question: bills by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Status, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Bills GROUP BY Status

Scenarios.Question: outages by severity
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Severity, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Outages GROUP BY Severity

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر حسب المنطقة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: bills by service type
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT st.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Bills b JOIN ServiceTypes st ON b.ServiceTypeId=st.Id GROUP BY st.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: customers by region
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Customers cu JOIN Regions r ON cu.RegionId=r.Id GROUP BY r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: outages by service type
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT st.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Outages o JOIN ServiceTypes st ON o.ServiceTypeId=st.Id GROUP BY st.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: which regions have more tickets than the average region?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn FROM Regions r JOIN Tickets t ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY r.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(CAST(c AS float)) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND RegionId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RegionId) x)

Scenarios.Question: customers whose total bills exceed the average customer
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH ct AS (SELECT CustomerId, SUM(TotalAmount) AS t FROM Bills GROUP BY CustomerId) SELECT cu.FullNameEn FROM ct JOIN Customers cu ON cu.Id=ct.CustomerId WHERE ct.t > (SELECT AVG(t) FROM ct)

Scenarios.Question: regions with more outages than average
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH oc AS (SELECT RegionId, COUNT(*) AS c FROM Outages WHERE RegionId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RegionId) SELECT r.NameEn FROM oc JOIN Regions r ON r.Id=oc.RegionId WHERE oc.c > (SELECT AVG(CAST(c AS float)) FROM oc)

Scenarios.Question: ما هي المناطق التي يتجاوز عدد تذاكرها متوسط عدد التذاكر؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn FROM Regions r JOIN Tickets t ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY r.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(CAST(c AS float)) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND RegionId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RegionId) x)

Scenarios.Question: service types with above-average total billing
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH s AS (SELECT ServiceTypeId, SUM(TotalAmount) AS t FROM Bills GROUP BY ServiceTypeId) SELECT st.NameEn FROM s JOIN ServiceTypes st ON st.Id=s.ServiceTypeId WHERE s.t > (SELECT AVG(t) FROM s)

Scenarios.Question: rank regions by ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS TicketCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS Rnk FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: rank customers by total billed amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.FullNameEn, SUM(b.TotalAmount) AS Total, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(b.TotalAmount) DESC) AS Rnk FROM Customers c JOIN Bills b ON b.CustomerId=c.Id GROUP BY c.FullNameEn

Scenarios.Question: top 3 regions by outage count, with rank
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS OutageCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS Rnk FROM Outages o JOIN Regions r ON o.RegionId=r.Id GROUP BY r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: running total of tickets by month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH m AS (SELECT DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month,0,CreatedAt),0) AS MonthStart, COUNT(*) AS c FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month,0,CreatedAt),0)) SELECT MonthStart, c, SUM(c) OVER (ORDER BY MonthStart ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS RunningTotal FROM m ORDER BY MonthStart

Scenarios.Question: رتب المناطق حسب عدد التذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS TicketCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS Rnk FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: top 5 customers by total billed amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.FullNameEn, SUM(b.TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Customers c JOIN Bills b ON b.CustomerId=c.Id GROUP BY c.FullNameEn ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: list overdue bills
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, TotalAmount, DueDate FROM Bills WHERE Status='Overdue'

Scenarios.Question: show the 10 most recent tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: customer names and phone numbers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn, Phone FROM Customers

Scenarios.Question: top 5 bills by amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 BillNumber, TotalAmount FROM Bills ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC

Scenarios.Question: أكبر 5 فواتير من حيث المبلغ
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 BillNumber, TotalAmount FROM Bills ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC

Scenarios.Question: list service types
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Code, NameEn, NameAr, Unit FROM ServiceTypes WHERE IsActive=1

Scenarios.Question: outages sorted by most affected customers first
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 OutageNumber, AffectedCustomerCount FROM Outages ORDER BY AffectedCustomerCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 3 regions with the most customers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Customers cu JOIN Regions r ON cu.RegionId=r.Id GROUP BY r.NameEn ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: customers with no email
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn, Email FROM Customers WHERE Email IS NULL OR Email=''

Scenarios.Question: tickets per month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month,0,CreatedAt),0) AS MonthStart, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month,0,CreatedAt),0) ORDER BY MonthStart

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets in March 2026?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND CreatedAt>='2026-03-01' AND CreatedAt<'2026-04-01'

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in 2025
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2025

Scenarios.Question: outages in the last 90 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE StartedAt >= DATEADD(day,-90,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر حسب الشهر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month,0,CreatedAt),0) AS MonthStart, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 GROUP BY DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month,0,CreatedAt),0) ORDER BY MonthStart

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose title mentions electricity
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND Title LIKE '%electric%'

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose title mentions water
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND Title LIKE '%water%'

Scenarios.Question: الأعطال التي تذكر الكهرباء في عنوانها
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT OutageNumber, TitleAr FROM Outages WHERE TitleAr LIKE N'%كهرباء%'

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets in Malki?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 AND r.NameEn='Malki'

Scenarios.Question: كم تذكرة في منطقة المالكي؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId=r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 AND r.NameEn='Malki'

Scenarios.Question: how many electricity bills?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills b JOIN ServiceTypes st ON b.ServiceTypeId=st.Id WHERE st.Code='Electricity'

Scenarios.Question: outages affecting the water service
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages o JOIN ServiceTypes st ON o.ServiceTypeId=st.Id WHERE st.NameEn='Water'

Scenarios.Question: high-priority tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON t.PriorityId=p.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 AND p.Name='High'

Scenarios.Question: resolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted=0 AND s.Name='Resolved'

Scenarios.Question: what's a good recipe for pasta?
